title: K-200 Payload Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Payload Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-464-G. Revision: G. Type: specification. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2024-03-23. Last modified: 2024-06-22. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1054, P-1116, P-1079.
